scripts.dev: concurrently --names "gateway,auth,users,products,orders,pdf,notifications" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue,red,white" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/gateway" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/user-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/product-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/order-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/pdf-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix services/notification-service"
